productDisplayName: Puma Women Osuran White Sports Shoes
description: Look good and feel great with the Osuran NM shoes from puma. These running shoes are built for performance and provide perfectly lightweight comfort. With sleek, stylish looks and a streamlined design, this shoe looks great when paired with casual wear too. Upper Synthetic and mesh upper for durability and breathablity Lightweight flexible overlays for maximum performance Padded tongue and collar for enhanced comfort Central lace-ups for a snug and customised Fit puma logo printed on the tongue and heel Midsole Phylon midsole provides soft underfoot plush for an absolute lightweight feeling Eco-ortholite, padded foot-bed for all day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with a notched heel cup that helps minimize irritation High-abrasion outsole delivers long-lasting traction and grip Impact guidance line along the outsole for absolute shock absorption Shoe care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
